steps.title: Define only the term
steps.content: The goal is to define 'high-sinuosity river.' The notes directly state that a river with high sinuosity has many meanders, and another note defines meanders as U-shaped curves.

steps.title: Avoid extra details
steps.content: Choice B adds how meanders change over time, which goes beyond a definition. Choice C gives a cause related to sediment, not the meaning of high sinuosity. Choice D discusses the Tanana River rather than defining the term generally. The answer is A.
